abilities.description: In your Movement phase, when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform an etheric emergence. abilities.name: Overkill

abilities.name: Intra-neural Biotech
abilities.description: Once per battle round, you can target this model with the Heroic Intervention or Counter‑offensive Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Reign of Confusion
abilities.description: Once per battle, after your opponent uses a Stratagem, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the battle, the CP cost your opponent must pay to use that Stratagem again is increased by 1CP.

abilities.name: Acrobatic Escape
abilities.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if this model is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Fall Back move of up to D6". In addition, at the end of your opponent's turn, if this model is not within 3" of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and then, in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models. If the battle ends and this model is not on the battlefield, it is destroyed.

abilities.name: Decoy Targets
abilities.description: Twice per battle, in your Movement phase, you can select one other friendly INFANTRY model that is on the battlefield and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and this model is removed from the battlefield and set up again as close as possible to where that destroyed model was and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. This ability cannot be used more than once in the same battle round.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save

abilities.description: At the start of your opponent's Shooting phase, select one enemy VEHICLE unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

abilities.name: Liber Heresius
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to 3 AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: No Escape (Aura)
abilities.description: While an enemy unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time it is selected to Fall Back it must first take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

abilities.name: Witch Hunter
abilities.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets a PSYKER unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Ignis Judicium
abilities.description: The bearer's ranged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS], [MELTA 1] and [PRECISION] abilities.

abilities.name: Formidable Resolve
abilities.description: Improve the bearer's Leadership and Wounds characteristics by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Battle-shocked unit within 12" of the bearer. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Daemon Slayer
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons, and those weapons have the **[ANTI-DAEMON 3+]** ability.

abilities.name: Grimoire of True Names (Aura)
abilities.description: While an enemy unit is within 9" of the bearer, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, while an enemy DAEMON unit is within 9" of the bearer, each time a model in that DAEMON unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Gift of the Prescient
abilities.description: Once per battle, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. When doing so, you must target a GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD unit from your army, and when using the Stratagem, that unit can be set up on the battlefield anywhere that is more than 3" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Digital Weapons
abilities.description: Each time the bearer is selected to fight, roll three D6; for each 4+, one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer suffers 1 mortal wound. Mortal wounds inflicted by this Enhancement are allocated as if they have the [PRECISION] ability.

abilities.name: Clandestine Operation
abilities.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM INFANTRY units from your army (excluding GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD units) - those units gain the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Fleetmaster
abilities.description: Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Violent Acquisition, Masters of the Void or Close-quarters Barrage Stratagems for 0CP.

abilities.name: Combat Landers
abilities.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three VOIDFARERS units from your army - those units gain the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Void Trader
abilities.description: If the bearer is on the battlefield at the end of the battle, increase your Crusade force's Supply Limit by 50 points. At the end of battle, you can select one model from your Crusade force that has one Crusade Relic or one weapon that has a Weapon Modification. If you do, you can remove that Battle Honour from that model - you can either replace that Battle Honour with a different Crusade Relic that model can have or you can gain 1RP.

abilities.name: Highly Placed Ally
abilities.description: If the bearer is your **^^Warlord^^**, start the battle with 1CP. If the bearer is on the battlefield at the end of the battle and you won that battle, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1RP.

abilities.name: Secret Forces
abilities.description: If the bearer is included in a Crusade army whose Army Faction is not **^^Agents of the Imperium^^**, the maximum number of **^^Requisitioned^^**, **^^Retinue^^** and **^^Agents of the Imperium Character^^** units that can be included in that army is increased by 1. Each time you start a Shadow Operation, you start with 1 Influence point.

abilities.name: Trained By A Legend
abilities.description: The bearer's unit has the Lone Operative, Infiltrators and Stealth abilities. Each time you start a Shadow Operation, you start with 1 Intrigue point.

abilities.name: Master of Spies
abilities.description: Each time you start a Shadow Operation, you start with 1 Investigation point. Each time you roll on the Plot Twist table, you can re-roll the result.

abilities.name: Bound Entity
abilities.description: **^^Radical^^** model only. The bearer's unit has the Deep Strike ability. Once per Shadow Operation, when you attempt to Thwart a Threat through Intrigue, you can re-roll that test. If the bearer loses the **^^Radical^^** keyword or gains the **^^Puritan^^** keyword by any means, it immediately loses this Battle Honour.

abilities.name: Upholder of the Creed
abilities.description: **^^Puritan^^** model only. Improve the bearer's Leadership and Wounds characteristics by 1. Once per Shadow Operation when you attempt to Thwart a Threat through Influence, you can re-roll that test. If the bearer loses the **^^Puritan^^** keyword or gains the **^^Radical^^** keyword by any means, it immediately loses this Battle Honour.

enhancements.name: Universal Anathema
enhancements.description: Melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 4+] abilities

enhancements.name: Blackweave Shroud
enhancements.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

enhancements.name: Beacon Angelis
enhancements.description: Models in the bearer's unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, you can target the bearer's unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Amulet of Auto-chastisement
enhancements.description: At the start of your opponent's Shooting phase, select one enemy VEHICLE unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

enhancements.name: Liber Heresius
enhancements.description: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to 3 AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: No Escape
enhancements.description: While an enemy unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time it is selected to Fall Back it must first take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

enhancements.name: Witch Hunter
enhancements.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets a PSYKER unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Ignis Judicium
enhancements.description: The bearer's ranged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS], [MELTA 1] and [PRECISION] abilities.

enhancements.name: Formidable Resolve
enhancements.description: Improve the bearer's Leadership and Wounds characteristics by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Battle-shocked unit within 12" of the bearer. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

enhancements.name: Daemon Slayer
enhancements.description: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons, and those weapons have the **[ANTI-DAEMON 3+]** ability.

enhancements.name: Grimoire of True Names
enhancements.description: While an enemy unit is within 9" of the bearer, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, while an enemy DAEMON unit is within 9" of the bearer, each time a model in that DAEMON unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Gift of the Prescient
enhancements.description: Once per battle, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. When doing so, you must target a GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD unit from your army, and when using the Stratagem, that unit can be set up on the battlefield anywhere that is more than 3" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: Digital Weapons
enhancements.description: Each time the bearer is selected to fight, roll three D6; for each 4+, one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer suffers 1 mortal wound. Mortal wounds inflicted by this Enhancement are allocated as if they have the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Clandestine Operation
enhancements.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM INFANTRY units from your army (excluding GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD units) - those units gain the Infiltrators ability.

enhancements.name: Fleetmaster
enhancements.description: Once per battle round, you can target the bearer's unit with the Violent Acquisition, Masters of the Void or Close-quarters Barrage Stratagems for 0CP.

enhancements.name: Combat Landers
enhancements.description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three VOIDFARERS units from your army - those units gain the Deep Strike ability.
